name: Unsigned to Signed Conversion Error
description: The product uses an unsigned primitive and performs a cast to a signed primitive, which can produce an unexpected value if the value of the unsigned primitive cannot be represented using a signed primitive. This can lead to buffer overflows, memory corruption, or denial of service.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS or STORAGE nodes containing unsigned integer values flowing through a TRANSFORM node (type cast to signed) without a CONTROL node (range validation) mediating the conversion. The signed result may be negative, causing downstream buffer or arithmetic errors.
